data.body: Threaded ref+source through all 5 code-reading gates via new gate_source.py + a context-local code root (contextvars) that LLMConfig.from_env honors, so configs rebuilt deep in the workflow (gate_ops citation resolution/reconcile) also read the pinned snapshot. attested re-roots reads to the snapshot; local reads the in-place checkout flagged unsigned (source/signable/verified_at_sha annotated). Defaults origin/main+attested via REBAR_GATE_*/[snapshot]. Regression test proves the attested verdict read-basis is identical regardless of checked-out branch. CLI close gate = source=local (single-dev verify-before-push); offline tests default local via conftest. Subagent review: no blocking issues, all 10 ACs met; folded findings (review_code ref defaults to head; contextvar deep-rebuild test; thread-caveat doc). 13 S3 + 681 gate/workflow tests green; ruff clean.
